evidence.snippet: Equipped with the Wave Relay® network, the MPU5 secure handheld radio is the most scalable and advanced MANET system in the world. Providing a secure voice, video, and high bandwidth data network anywhere, the MPU5 unites all your critical sensor and data sources in real time. Steatite is the UK's only authorised provider of this technology.

Tried and tested in the harshest environments the Wave Relay MANET complements any unmanned system, be it Air, Ground or Maritime. [Steatite](https://www.steatite.co.uk/) provides market-leading wireless RF unmanned communication solutions forged through market-leading partnerships to assist all areas of industry.

items.notes: MANET radios, data links, and antennas (Wave Relay® product family) for tactical and unmanned-systems communications

evidence.snippet:
**Encompassing comprehensive capabilities : The CRiB**
The [CRiB](https://steatite-communications.co.uk/universal-command-and-control-terminal/) is a perfect example of our proficiency in innovative, rugged and reliable custom engineering, combining the skills and extensive capabilities of all our Business Units. Developed to be highly mobile, easy to use and quick to deploy, the CRiB provides a smart command and control system ideal for tactical operations.

items.notes: Universal Command & Control Terminal (CRiB) – a Steatite-developed mobile C2 system

Equipped with the Wave Relay® network, the MPU5 secure handheld radio is the most scalable and advanced MANET system in the world. Providing a secure voice, video, and high bandwidth data network anywhere, the MPU5 unites all your critical sensor and data sources in real time. Steatite is the UK's only authorised provider of this technology.

Tried and tested in the harshest environments the Wave Relay MANET complements any unmanned system, be it Air, Ground or Maritime. [Steatite](https://www.steatite.co.uk/) provides market-leading wireless RF unmanned communication solutions forged through market-leading partnerships to assist all areas of industry.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: UK's only authorised provider of Persistent Systems' Wave Relay® MANET technology; supplies communications subsystems (data links, MANET radios, antennas, embedded modules) explicitly targeting UAV/UGV/USV platforms. Also develops own products (CRiB C2 terminal).

evidence.snippet:
*   ### MPU5 Radio
    A Mobile Ad hoc Network (MANET) is a collection of mobile devices, that form a self-configuring network.
    [Read more](https://www.steatite-communications.co.uk/wave-relay-mpu5-radio/)

*   ### Embedded Module
    The Embedded Module enables easy integration into Unmanned Systems and sensors, reducing SWaP.
    [Read more](https://www.steatite-communications.co.uk/wave-relay-embedded-module/)
*   [GVR5](https://steatite-communications.co.uk/gvr5/ "GVR5")

*   ### Multi-Band Tracking Antenna
    Track UAVs and Aircraft at long ranges with high throughput.
    [Read more](https://www.steatite-communications.co.uk/wave-relay-auto-tracking-antenna-system/)

**Encompassing comprehensive capabilities : The CRiB**
The [CRiB](https://steatite-communications.co.uk/universal-command-and-control-terminal/) is a perfect example of our proficiency in innovative, rugged and reliable custom engineering, combining the skills and extensive capabilities of all our Business Units. Developed to be highly mobile, easy to use and quick to deploy, the CRiB provides a smart command and control system ideal for tactical operations.
*   [Mountable Mobile Communications Unit (MMCU)](https://steatite-communications.co.uk/mountable-mobile-communications-unit/ "Mountable Mobile Communications Unit (MMCU)")

*   ### Dual Push To Talk (PTT)
    Enables dual channel communication via a single radio, enhancing the MPU5's RoIP capability.
    [Read more](https://www.steatite-communications.co.uk/wave-relay-dual-ptt/)
*   [Integrated Antenna Series](https://steatite-communications.co.uk/integrated-antenna-series/ "Integrated Antenna Series")
*   [Cloud Relay™](https://steatite-communications.co.uk/cloud-relay/ "Cloud Relay™")
*   [Mobile AD-HOC Communications Environment (MACE)](https://steatite-communications.co.uk/mobile-ad-hoc-communications-environment/ "Mobile AD-HOC Communications Environment (MACE)")
*   [Dual Optical & Thermal PTZ Camera](https://steatite-communications.co.uk/dual-optical-and-thermal-ptz-camera/ "Dual Optical &  Thermal PTZ Camera")
*   [Rugged Display & Controller](https://steatite-communications.co.uk/rugged-display-and-controller/ "Rugged Display & Controller")

**Manufacturing:**
Manufactured in the USA
ISO 9001:2009 Certified
Designed to MIL-STD

**Using the skillset of the whole Steatite group we  are able to offer designing, prototyping, testing and volume production of customised rugged technology. This enables us to deliver bespoke solutions for various elements of your project, with industry-leading expertise beyond just the world of communications.

readiness.notes: Catalog products with detailed datasheets and spec sheets in production; group also offers prototyping through to volume production

unresolved_questions: NDAA Section 848/889 compliance status not disclosed (UK-headquartered vendor, less likely to be relevant)
Blue UAS cleared list status not disclosed
tagline: UK-based maker of Wave Relay® MANET communications systems for unmanned and tactical operations, including the MPU5 handheld radio, embedded modules, vehicle-mounted GVR5, command terminals, and L/S/C-band tracking antennas. Also supplies thermal/optical PTZ cameras and radio-over-IP gateways. Production-ready across all major product lines. NDAA and Blue UAS certification status unknown; no named US prime contracts found in public record.
